description_html:
IEEE Paper Presentation:

  • The IEEE Paper Presentation event provides a platform for students to present their research work, technical ideas, and innovative projects in core and emerging engineering domains.
  • Participants are encouraged to showcase original research papers, project work, or conceptual ideas aligned with IEEE standards.

Event Structure:

  • The event is conducted in two stages: an initial submission round followed by a final presentation round for shortlisted participants.
  • The competition emphasizes originality, technical depth, feasibility, and effective communication of ideas.

Eligibility:

  • Students enrolled in B.Tech, Dual Degree, or M.Tech programs are eligible to participate. Participants can form a team of up to 3 members. Individual participation is also allowed.

Topics:

  • Research Work / Projects under the following topics are welcome to the event:
    • Signal Processing
    • Communication
    • VLSI Technology
    • Robotics and Automation
    • Oceanic Engineering
    • Computational Intelligence
    • Photonics
    • Any other new age technology
